profile.name: Pravallika Mutyala
profile.title: Apigee Developer | API Management (Apigee X/Edge)
profile.summary: Apigee Developer with 2.5 years of experience building and supporting API proxies, shared flows, security policies, CI/CD deployments, and production troubleshooting. Prior experience includes Linux application support and banking back-office operations.

highlights.title: API Proxy Development
highlights.description: Built and maintained Apigee API proxies and shared flows for internal and partner integrations with standardized error handling.

highlights.title: Security & Governance
highlights.description: Worked on OAuth 2.0, JWT validation, API key verification, CORS, and header enforcement for secure API consumption.

highlights.title: Production Support
highlights.description: Handled request tracing, log analysis, runbook updates, and resiliency controls such as Quota, Spike Arrest, caching, and retries.

points: Developed and maintained Apigee API proxies and shared flows for internal and partner integrations.
Implemented OAuth 2.0 and JWT validation, API key verification, enforced headers, and CORS policies.
Applied Spike Arrest, Quota, caching, timeouts, and retries to protect downstream services.
Supported production issues via request tracing and log analysis; documented fixes and improved runbooks.
Provided L1/L2 support including log analysis, configuration validation, and incident triage.
Performed Linux troubleshooting around processes, disk, memory, network, and certificate investigations.
Performed KYC checks and account quality validations during customer onboarding.
Conducted AML investigations and supported Trade Finance operations including Letters of Credit and SWIFT/SFMS handling.

projects.title: API Management & Shared Flows
projects.description: Maintained reusable shared flows, target servers, and fault handling across API integrations.

projects.title: OAuth 2.0 / JWT Policies
projects.description: Implemented authentication and validation layers for secure API access patterns.

projects.title: Incident Troubleshooting
projects.description: Used trace and log analysis to resolve production issues and reduce turnaround time for incidents.

contact.pitch: I am currently open to Apigee Developer and API management roles. This portfolio is driven by a single config file, so you can update it quickly without touching the React components.
